name: Jacksonville Hard Money Lenders
description_short: BridgeWell Capital is a private hard money lender in Jacksonville offering fast real estate investment loans (fix-and-flip, cash-out refi, commercial) with closings in as little as 10 days.
description_long:
BridgeWell Capital operates as a private money lender serving Jacksonville, Florida's real estate investment market. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banks and conventional lenders, specifically targeting investors who may have poor credit, recent foreclosures, short sales, or self-employment income that disqualifies them from standard financing.

The company offers multiple loan products tailored to real estate investors: fix-and-flip loans with no interest on undrawn rehab funds, commercial loans ranging from $150K-$2MM for office/retail/mixed-use properties, cash-out refinancing for investment properties, owner-occupied Florida loans with 360-day terms and no prepayment penalties, and rehab-only financing. They emphasize fast funding timelines (as little as 10 days) and flexible underwriting terms compared to conventional lenders.

BridgeWell Capital differentiates itself through claims of being "TRUE In-House Private Money Lenders" with emphasis on consistent, responsive customer service and repeat customer loyalty. They provide account executives for personalized guidance throughout the loan process and offer free market reports with detailed Jacksonville real estate statistics (average home prices, rent ratios, population growth, unemployment data) updated monthly.

The company is legitimate and transparent about its lending model and target market. However, as a private/hard money lender, borrowers should expect higher interest rates than conventional mortgages, shorter loan terms, and lending decisions based primarily on property equity rather than creditworthiness. The website content is substantive but incomplete—the terms page was cut off, limiting visibility into specific rate ranges, fees, and exact eligibility criteria.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Funding available in as little as 10 days—significantly faster than traditional banks
No interest charged on undrawn rehab funds for fix-and-flip loans, reducing carrying costs
Flexible underwriting: accepts borrowers with poor credit, recent foreclosures/short sales, and self-employed income
Owner-occupied Florida loans offer 360-day terms with no prepayment penalties
Commercial loan range up to $2MM with flexible occupancy options (owner-occ, non owner-occ, vacant, or leased)
Free monthly Jacksonville real estate market reports with detailed investment analytics
Personal account executives provided for each borrower throughout process
cons: Private/hard money lenders typically charge significantly higher interest rates than conventional mortgages
Shorter loan terms common in hard money lending create higher monthly payments and refinance pressure
Website lacks transparent pricing: no rate ranges, specific fees, or detailed fee schedules published
Limited to Florida (owner-occ product explicitly Florida-only; regional focus unclear for other products)
As asset-based lenders, approval depends primarily on property equity/value rather than borrower creditworthiness, limiting accessibility for those with significant equity gaps
best_for: Real estate fix-and-flip investors needing fast capital and flexible underwriting for renovation projects
Commercial real estate investors purchasing or refinancing office, retail, or mixed-use properties
Investment property owners with poor credit or recent financial events (foreclosure, short sale) unable to qualify for conventional financing
Self-employed real estate entrepreneurs unable to document income conventionally
diagnosis: BridgeWell Capital is best for real estate investors who need fast funding and flexible underwriting that traditional banks won't provide, particularly those with prior credit challenges or investment-focused properties. The main caveat is that hard money loans carry significantly higher costs than conventional mortgages and shorter terms, making them suitable only for investors with clear exit strategies (property sales, refinances) rather than long-term holding.
services: Fix-and-flip purchase and rehab loans with no interest on undrawn funds
Commercial real estate loans ($150K-$2MM) for office, retail, mixed-use, and medical office properties
Owner-occupied residential loans (Florida only, 360-day terms, no prepayment penalty)
Repair credit lines attached to loans for faster project completion
Flexible loan terms and underwriting for non-traditional borrowers
Personal account executive support throughout loan process
Free monthly Jacksonville real estate market reports
Market analysis tools including rent forecasts and rent-to-price ratios
Population growth and job growth statistics for investment decision-making
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7061 Old Kings Rd S #154, Jacksonville, FL 32217
